architectures.name: Coconut GPT-2 GSM8K
architectures.status: downloaded; exact chart insertion and the C1c differentiable FCTR integration gate both pass
architectures.limitation: The evaluated checkpoint emits a nearly fixed delimiter and short numerical answer; H2/H3 already explains its apparent H1 blind spot, so it cannot authorize multi-horizon FCTR.

architectures.name: SWITCH Qwen3-8B Phase-3 GRPO
architectures.status: source pinned; official CPU tests and the local source/metadata preflight pass; C2 identity, eligibility, calibration, and held-out runners are frozen but the 24.2 GB paper-final checkpoint has not been downloaded or executed

evidence.claim: The released inference loop feeds each last-layer hidden state back as the next latent input and supports a minimum latent dwell.
The RL source decides latent exit by argmax after minimum dwell, then force-appends </swi> with sampled_mask=0; the end marker is not sampled as a GRPO action.
The paper-final training launcher disables optional latent noise and latent replay by default.
When manually enabled, optional latent exploration normalizes Gaussian noise to a unit direction before applying a hidden-norm-scaled radius; it is not an unconstrained Gaussian draw.

architectures.compute_boundary: The pinned base and adapter contain about 24.2 GB of weight files before runtime state. The frozen runner requires at least 78 GiB visible VRAM; H20 96 GB is preferred, with A100/H100 80 GB as alternatives. This rental is for C2 inference/autodiff, not training.

mandatory_baselines.name: FishBack
mandatory_baselines.boundary: Pullback Fisher geometry and minimum-output-KL steering are prior art. FCTR must demonstrate an operational multi-horizon gain beyond next-token FishBack, not merely reproduce coordinate invariance.

mandatory_baselines.name: short-prefix functional geometry
mandatory_baselines.boundary: H1, cumulative H2, cumulative H3, and a semantic-boundary prefix must be compared before any longer-horizon estimator is credited.
